productDisplayName: Puma Men Powercat Black Sports Shoes
description: A low profile football sneaker, the puma PowerCat lives up to its name, offering great speed and traction with maximum comfort and grip on turf. Simple and stylish, these shoes can be teamed with jeans and tees for casual outings.UpperSynthetic leather upper with stitch detailing for structure, durability and protectionLace-ups for snug FitPadded fabric tongue for greater comfortLightly padded collar for greater comfortcat logo appliquéd on the sides and embossed on the back and tongueMidsoleLightweight midsole for cushioned comfortMildly padded footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durabilityStrategically placed cleats for tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
